# nikitakramar.mullmania.com

This site is a source-backed interpretation of Nikita Kramar's public website for Mike.
It is not an official biography and does not claim private knowledge.

Primary purpose:
- Help Mike become a better interlocutor by separating observed evidence, inference, unknowns, and questions to ask.

Canonical page:
- https://nikitakramar.mullmania.com/

Structured data:
- /data/claims.json
- /data/sources.json

Source policy:
- Claims marked "Observed" are grounded in the source ledger.
- Claims marked "Inference" are interpretations and should not be repeated as facts.
- The page intentionally avoids turning short public notes into corrected pitches.

Main thesis:
- If work gets deprecated, what do we preserve on purpose?

Primary live wires:
- Proof-loop design
- Agent-readable personal memory

Last generated:
- 2026-05-17
